groups.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates
groups.description: Aggregate routes keyed by aggregate name in the current context or by fully qualified context.aggregate name.

properties.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates.*.event.storage
properties.description: EventStore backend type for this aggregate. Selects an existing backend type; it does not define backend connection settings.

properties.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates.*.event.binding
properties.description: Named EventStore binding for this aggregate. The binding must be provided by application code or auto-configuration.

properties.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates.*.snapshot.storage
properties.description: SnapshotStore backend type for this aggregate. Selects an existing backend type; it does not define backend connection settings.

properties.name: wow.eventsourcing.storage-routing.aggregates.*.snapshot.binding
properties.description: Named SnapshotStore binding for this aggregate. The binding must be provided by application code or auto-configuration.
